Appearances:
Plaintiff Nasir Patel is present and in Pro Per.
Defendant Scott Alan Nelson is present.
Attorney Kelli Shields representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Neil Bardack, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of NOV-13-2012 remains on calendar.
